notes: This Linux-native game launches and displays fine, but an invisible bounding box prevents the game cursor from accessing the menu items on the right side of the game screen. This menu contains buttons for starting a new game, accessing game options, etc.. Message left on Paladin's Oath discussion forum to see if developer has suggestion on rectifying this limitation on Steam Deck.
title: Paladin's Oath

notes: Dev Responded - setting to Proton 7.05 fixes bounding box issue
title: Paladin's Oath
